name: 16_system_b_met_threshold_minus_one_breaks
description: Branch 3 / System B: bleed condition met, prev bleed_ticks = threshold-1 (=2), increments to threshold (=3), is_vwap_bleed_broken flips True at exact equality.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 0.0 >= cross 2.0 FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset. System B: current_return -2.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 TRUE -> new_bleed_ticks = 2+1 = 3. is_vwap_bleed_broken = (3 >= vwap_bleed_ticks_threshold 3) = TRUE. Returns (0, 3, False, True). Pins threshold semantics: `>=` flips on FIRST tick at threshold.
